name: museum_guide
description: Museum docent walking visitors through an exhibit on sensory perception. Each section is a gallery room.
register: Second person plural, invitational, pointing at things. 'If you look to your left...' The exhibit is the essay.
rules: Jack Jack is in the first room -- a video installation of a dog at a hedge
Each section is a room or gallery
Research papers are the wall text and provenance labels
VRGB keeps its name -- it is the centerpiece installation in the final room
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Transitions between sections are walking between rooms
The mantis shrimp room has a specimen tank (imagined)
The coda is the exit -- through the gift shop, past the sculpture of a dog
